# Alpha Website Design | PPC: New Ads for PPC & SEO

# [Alpha Website Design | PPC](/2325709/projects/19872116)

Alpha Website Design | PPC: New Ads for PPC & SEO

#### Are you sure you want to show this message and its comments to the client?

They’ll be able to see any comments that have been made so far and add their own.

# Message

Project: [Alpha Website Design | PPC](/2325709/projects/19872116)

### New Ads for PPC & SEO

Posted by Can Basaloglu on May 2, 2025

[![Can Basaloglu](https://asset1.basecamp.com/2325709/people/18232741/photo/avatar.96.gif "Can Basaloglu")](/2325709/people/18232741)

Hi Kevin,  
  
We’ve been informed that you’re interested in advertising PPC and SEO services as well. We've prepared a set of ad copy and keywords that can be used to promote those services. You can find the document here:  
[https://docs.google.com/spreadsheets/d/1q0Rm93tpcZxKNItON9o25f9VEvhtjBRtFHb…](https://docs.google.com/spreadsheets/d/1q0Rm93tpcZxKNItON9o25f9VEvhtjBRtFHb9rPxyoww/edit?gid=190977041#gid=190977041 "https://docs.google.com/spreadsheets/d/1q0Rm93tpcZxKNItON9o25f9VEvhtjBRtFHb9rPxyoww/edit?gid=190977041#gid=190977041")  
  
I’d also like to mention that our current budget may not be sufficient to promote all three services. Since we've already tested the web design campaign for a while, we could pause that campaign and launch a new one focusing on PPC and SEO.  
  
Given the limited budget, I’d recommend running both services under a single campaign with two separate ad groups. This way, we can monitor performance and shift focus to the better-performing service.  
  
Please let me know your thoughts, and we can move forward with the changes as soon as you approve.  
  
Best,  
Can

#### Discuss this message

[![Kevin Henderson](https://asset1.basecamp.com/2325709/people/19007196/photo/avatar.96.gif "Kevin Henderson")](/2325709/people/19007196)

**Kevin Henderson**   
Pause the web design campaign. Use the budget towards the new campaign.   
  
You can also proceed with your next suggestion. Run both services under a single campaign with two separate ad groups.

[Posted on May 2, 2025](/2325709/projects/19872116/messages/110225909#comment_951404512)

[![Kevin Henderson](https://asset1.basecamp.com/2325709/people/19007196/photo/avatar.96.gif "Kevin Henderson")](/2325709/people/19007196)

**Kevin Henderson**   
Also, I'd like to see the ad image concepts when they are completed.

[Posted on May 2, 2025](/2325709/projects/19872116/messages/110225909#comment_951404914)

[![Can Basaloglu](https://asset1.basecamp.com/2325709/people/18232741/photo/avatar.96.gif "Can Basaloglu")](/2325709/people/18232741)

**Can Basaloglu**   
Perfect! We've launched the new campaign and paused the web design services campaign.

[Posted on May 2, 2025](/2325709/projects/19872116/messages/110225909#comment_951408416)

[![Can Basaloglu](https://asset1.basecamp.com/2325709/people/18232741/photo/avatar.96.gif "Can Basaloglu")](/2325709/people/18232741)

**Can Basaloglu**   

Hi Kevin,

Apologies for the delay, our creative team has been handling a high volume of work.

Here is the link for the images created for both PPC and SEO services, intended for use in the Performance Max campaign: <https://drive.google.com/drive/folders/15XPt087oJXBLn_YxFJZkRz3sqaNmXaEm>

We'll be using these visuals alongside additional headlines and descriptions at the campaign level. The brand logo will also be included in the creatives for the Performance Max campaign.

Please let me know your thoughts. If you give us the green light, we can set up the campaign right away and have it launched within a day.

Best regards,  
Can

[Posted on Jun 5, 2025](/2325709/projects/19872116/messages/110225909#comment_953498545)

[![Kevin Henderson](https://asset1.basecamp.com/2325709/people/19007196/photo/avatar.96.gif "Kevin Henderson")](/2325709/people/19007196)

**Kevin Henderson**   
Thank you. Branding has been updated, files attached.

[Posted on Jun 5, 2025](/2325709/projects/19872116/messages/110225909#comment_953504978)

Hi Kevin,

We've prepared a draft for the Performance Max campaign. You can find the links below for ad previews.

Yeliz

[![Can Basaloglu](https://asset1.basecamp.com/2325709/people/18232741/photo/avatar.96.gif "Can Basaloglu")](/2325709/people/18232741)

**Can Basaloglu**   
Perfect! We've launched the new campaign and paused the web design services campaign.

[Posted on May 2, 2025](/2325709/projects/19872116/messages/110225909#comment_951408416)

[![Can Basaloglu](https://asset1.basecamp.com/2325709/people/18232741/photo/avatar.96.gif "Can Basaloglu")](/2325709/people/18232741)

**Can Basaloglu**   

Hi Kevin,

Apologies for the delay, our creative team has been handling a high volume of work.

Here is the link for the images created for both PPC and SEO services, intended for use in the Performance Max campaign: <https://drive.google.com/drive/folders/15XPt087oJXBLn_YxFJZkRz3sqaNmXaEm>

We'll be using these visuals alongside additional headlines and descriptions at the campaign level. The brand logo will also be included in the creatives for the Performance Max campaign.

Please let me know your thoughts. If you give us the green light, we can set up the campaign right away and have it launched within a day.

Best regards,  
Can

[Posted on Jun 5, 2025](/2325709/projects/19872116/messages/110225909#comment_953498545)

[![Kevin Henderson](https://asset1.basecamp.com/2325709/people/19007196/photo/avatar.96.gif "Kevin Henderson")](/2325709/people/19007196)

**Kevin Henderson**   
Thank you. Branding has been updated, files attached.

**Yeliz Kolasinli**   

Hi Kevin,

We've prepared a draft for the Performance Max campaign. You can find the links below for ad previews.

Yeliz
